[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized illustrated portrait shows a long-haired figure with a serious expression, partially covered by a small yellow smiley-face icon near the mouth area.

Main Subject:  
The main focus is an illustrated person with pale skin and long, dark blue hair that falls past the shoulders. The face is angled slightly with narrow eyes and a closed-mouth, calm expression, and the figure wears a dark garment with a high collar. A small yellow circular smiley-face icon with black eyes and a black smile overlaps the lower part of the face.

Setting:  
The background appears to be a flat, dark blue-to-black gradient with no clear environment, suggesting a simple graphic or digital illustration background.

Visual Details:  
The illustration uses bold, clean linework and flat shading. The hair is dark blue with highlights and multiple curved strands framing the face. Thin, dark eyebrow and eye lines emphasize the eyes, while the high collar and darker clothing blend into the background. The camera angle appears to be a close-up, front-facing portrait with the head slightly tilted. Lighting is stylized and even, with no realistic shadows. The smiley icon is bright yellow and stands out against the darker tones.

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:  
The image is a digital illustration of a long-haired person shown from the shoulders up with a serious expression. A yellow smiley-face icon overlays part of the face near the mouth area.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text visible in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- Emoji shown: 😐

# Notes

- The image appears to contain only an emoji and no other readable, copyable text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
